purpose: Labeled test set for evaluating scheme matching accuracy

testCases.farmerStatement: I have 100 acres and I own chickens and hens which I sell the eggs for. I have natural water rivers on my farm as well.
testCases.notes: Clear poultry + productivity intent, should surface housing grant

testCases.farmerStatement: We run a 200-hectare dairy farm in the Lake District. Want to invest in slurry management infrastructure and improve animal welfare.
testCases.notes: Dairy + slurry + protected landscape = FiPL + Slurry grant

testCases.farmerStatement: I'm looking to plant trees and create new woodland on 5 hectares of marginal farmland. Interested in carbon sequestration benefits.
50 acres mixed enterprise: sheep, some beef cattle, arable crops. I'm in an AONB. Want to improve soil health and reduce inputs.
testCases.notes: Mixed farm + protected landscape + environment focus = CSHT + FiPL

testCases.farmerStatement: Running an intensive glasshouse vegetable operation. Want to invest in automation, sensors, and LED growing technology to boost efficiency.
testCases.notes: Horticulture + tech/automation = FETF + Improving Farm Productivity (solar/robots)

testCases.farmerStatement: Three farms (1500 hectares combined) in partnership. We want to undertake large-scale peatland restoration and habitat recovery.
testCases.notes: Large scale + collaboration + habitat = Landscape Recovery (requires 500 ha min, groups)

testCases.farmerStatement: I grow outdoor and covered crops. Facing drought seasons. Looking to build a storage reservoir and improve irrigation efficiency.
testCases.notes: Water storage + irrigation = Water Management grant (now closed but historically relevant)

testCases.farmerStatement: Thinking of adding on-farm processing to my apple orchard. Want to build a small juice and cider production facility for local sales.
testCases.notes: Processing/marketing intent, Adding Value grant is closed but should be recognized

testCases.farmerStatement: We want to trial a new cover crop rotation system with a university research partner to improve soil carbon and reduce inputs.
testCases.notes: Research + innovation + soil health intent = FIP + SFI

testCases.farmerStatement: I already have a Countryside Stewardship agreement. Looking for additional funding to upgrade livestock housing and install solar panels.
testCases.notes: Existing agreement constraint + capital/tech = capital items + FETF (SFI may have restrictions)

evaluationMetrics.precision_at_3: % of top 3 results that are in expectedMatches
evaluationMetrics.incorrect_open_rate: % of returned schemes that are in shouldNotMatch or are closed
evaluationMetrics.explainability_score: % of results with >= 1 reason and >= 1 eligibility check
